# Format Matrix

Use this matrix to pick the conversion approach.

## Documents
- PDF ↔ DOCX (pikepdf/PyMuPDF)
- PDF ↔ PPTX (pikepdf/PyMuPDF)
- DOCX ↔ PPTX (pikepdf/PyMuPDF)

## Tables
- CSV ↔ XLSX (openpyxl)
- CSV ↔ TSV (openpyxl)

## Images
- PNG ↔ JPG (Pillow)
- PNG/JPG ↔ WEBP (Pillow)
- TIFF ↔ PNG/JPG (Pillow)
- PNG/JPG/BMP → SVG (potrace command-line tool)

## GIF
- GIF optimization (gifsicle/Pillow)
- GIF creation from images (Pillow)

## Video
- MP4 ↔ MOV (ffmpeg-python)
- MP4 ↔ WEBM (ffmpeg-python)
- MP4 ↔ AVI (ffmpeg-python)
- Extract audio from video (ffmpeg-python)

## Audio
- MP3 ↔ WAV (ffmpeg-python)
- MP3 ↔ FLAC (ffmpeg-python)
- WAV ↔ FLAC (ffmpeg-python)

## OCR
- Image/PDF → TXT (pytesseract + Tesseract)
- PNG/JPG/TIFF → TXT (pytesseract)

## CAD
- DXF → SVG (ezdxf)
- DXF parsing and modification (ezdxf)

## Subtitles
- SRT → VTT (pysrt)
- SRT time shifting (pysrt)
- SRT slicing (pysrt)
